markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on PSEO strategy for the new product and sync on content production.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**PSEO Strategy:** Launch a high-volume PSEO campaign (\~80+ pages) for the new agent product, targeting use cases like "fetch Salesforce data for AI agent."](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**Quality-First Approach:** Prioritize a high-converting page template over immediate scale. This is critical for the zero-to-one product launch, unlike the established data infrastructure product.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [**Content Cadence:** Pause the "Agent Blueprint" series for two weeks. Build a 3–4 article backlog to eliminate last-minute reviews and create a buffer for future travel/conferences.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [**Action Plan:** Jakub to share high-converting page examples; Tanmay to draft the page template this week; Mario to review with Tanmay and Michelle.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)

## Topics

### PSEO Strategy for New Product

  - [**Opportunity:** A high-volume PSEO campaign for the new agent product, targeting use cases where users need to connect data to AI agents.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [**Initial Scope:** \~80+ pages, based on a list from Tanmay.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [**Page Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [**Focus:** Connectors-based use cases, not generic connector pages.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [**Example:** "Fetch Salesforce data for marketing agents."](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
      - [**Content:** Must be technical, featuring templatizable code snippets (e.g., Python) to provide value.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
    1.  [**Inspiration:** Jakub to share high-converting page examples.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
    2.  [**Template Draft:** Tanmay to create a page template doc this week.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
    3.  [**Internal Review:** Mario, Tanmay, and Michelle to review the doc.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
    4.  [**Wireframing:** Jakub to create wireframes post-holidays.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
    5.  [**Build:** Engineering to begin building the pages.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Cadence:** Wireframe the second PSEO opportunity while the first is being built to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)

### Content Production & Holiday Schedule

  - [**Content Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [**Published Articles:** Indexed; seeing initial impressions/clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [**5 Weekly Articles:** Awaiting publication after addressing Airbyte team comments.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [**Thought Leadership Article:** Shared for review; Kushal and Mario to provide comments today for a potential Thursday publication.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [**Holiday Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [**"Agent Blueprint" Series:** Paused for two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
      - [**Next Post:** Target Jan 7–8.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
      - [**Interim Promotion:** A "best of" post will link to the first three articles.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [**New Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build a 3–4 article backlog to eliminate last-minute reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
      - [**Trigger:** When the backlog drops to three articles, Erik will request a new batch.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jakub:** Share high-converting page examples by EOD Dec 18.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [**Tanmay:**](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [Draft the PSEO page template doc this week.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [Review the doc with Mario and Michelle.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [**Kushal:** Review the Thought Leadership article and provide comments today.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [Update the 5 weekly articles with Airbyte team comments.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [Send the "Primer on Path Search and Write" article for review.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [Maintain the new content cadence to build the 3–4 article backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/dm-ejSFesGs3D5yHxk6PSidKVPZMChqA?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
